# New Persona Template

Use this template when proposing a new role or persona to include in docs/octoacme-roles-and-personas.md.

- Name: <Role / Persona name>
- Purpose: <One-sentence summary of why this role exists>
- Responsibilities: |
  - <Primary responsibility 1>
  - <Primary responsibility 2>
- Interactions: |
  - Works with <role> for <purpose>
  - Coordinates with <role> for <purpose>
- Acceptance Criteria: |
  - <How we'll know this role is performing its responsibilities>
- Suggested Owner: <Team or function responsible for maintaining this role definition>
- Notes / Rationale: |
  - <Any additional context, rationale, or related docs>
